def compute_histogram(image_path):
    image = cv2.imread(image_path)
    if image is None:
        return None
    hist = cv2.calcHist([image], [0, 1, 2], None, [8, 8, 8], [0, 256, 0, 256, 0, 256])
    cv2.normalize(hist, hist)
    return hist.flatten()
